title: Shield Banner Fix
description: Fixes issues related to banner patterns on shields.
body:
This mod fixes an old ["bug"](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-86135) that causes shields with banners to display inconsistently. With this mod installed the shield will display banner patterns with the same level of detail as a normal banner.

![Preview of the mod in action.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XTAy8Fqs/images/d5031a9534d545558f5db01ee79e5b20913f2611.png)

## How it Works
The Minecraft banner system defines two textures for each pattern. The block form of the banner uses a 20x40 texture while the shield uses a much smaller 10x20 texture. Despite being labeled as a bug on their official issue tracker, this was likely an intentional decision by the developers to keep banners pixel consistent with the rest of the time. This mod defines higher quality textures which restores the accuracy and quality that was lost by that decision.
